backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AI Health Zon backend, defining all core data types (medical records, healthcare professionals, vendors, NGOs, ambulance, hospitals, research projects) and including role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React application, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Application router configuration using TanStack Router, mapping all page routes including HealthNetworkLanding at '/', the former Home at '/platform', and all other feature pages wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: Floating AI chatbot widget with an expandable chat interface that provides keyword-based responses about healthcare services, RCM, careers, vendors, and contact information.
frontend/src/components/ClaimProtocolsSe: Accordion-based UI component displaying a detailed 6+ phase RCM claim protocol workflow, with steps and requirements for each phase from patient registration through claim submission.
frontend/src/components/ComprehensiveMet: Displays a grid of six animated metric cards (e.g., 500+ Network Entities, 100+ Cities) that fade in when the section scrolls into view using IntersectionObserver.
A react-hook-form form that collects user details (name, hospital, designation, mobile, email, city, message) and submits a demo booking request via a mutation hook, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand info, contact email, social media icons, and navigation links grouped into Solutions, Network, and other columns.
frontend/src/components/HealthcareJourne: Presents the end-to-end patient journey across six alternating-layout stages (Discovery through Reconciliation), each with capabilities listed, alongside an RCM journey banner image.
frontend/src/components/HealthGardenTree: Hero section rendered as an SVG 'health garden tree' with six interactive branch nodes linking to platform sections, plus Book a Demo and Explore RCM Solutions CTA buttons backed by a modal form.
frontend/src/components/HeroEcosystem.ts: Full-width hero section with an animated SVG connection graph overlaying five ecosystem nodes, CTA buttons for demo booking and RCM exploration, and a background healthcare concept image.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines a full-page layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer components with flex column styling.
frontend/src/components/MemberDetailView: Renders a modal dialog showing detailed profile information for a unified member (professional, vendor, or NGO), including contact actions for WhatsApp and email.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Implements a responsive sticky navigation bar with dropdown menus for desktop and an expandable mobile menu, covering all major site sections.
frontend/src/components/PendingRequestsL: Displays a list of pending membership requests (professional, vendor, NGO, or ambulance) by rendering RequestDetailCard components, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlatformNavigati: Renders a categorized grid of cards linking to all major platform sections such as RCM Solutions, Network, Services, Resources, and Company pages.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Provides a form for new users to set their name and account type (hospital, professional, vendor, NGO), then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RequestDetailCar: Renders an expandable card for a single pending request with approve/reject actions, contact shortcuts (WhatsApp, email), and formatted submission details for all request types.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderDetai: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a stakeholder (Hospital, Vendor, or NGO), including contact info, type-specific details, and action buttons for WhatsApp, email, and website.
frontend/src/components/SurgicalProcedur: A section component that renders a grid of 15 common surgical procedures, each displayed as a card with a name and description.
frontend/src/components/TreatmentCard.ts: A reusable card component for displaying a treatment type with an icon, description, bullet points, footer tag, a checklist button, and a tooltip showing a hover benefit.
frontend/src/components/TreatmentCheckli: A modal dialog that displays a scrollable validation checklist for a given treatment type, showing checklist items with titles, descriptions, and validation criteria.
frontend/src/components/TreatmentCTAStri: A call-to-action banner with 'Request Demo' and 'See How It Works' buttons, where the latter smoothly scrolls to the validation-layers section.
frontend/src/components/TreatmentFeature: A strip component that displays five feature icons and labels explaining how treatment validation cards work (e.g., auto-activated checklist, deviation flagging).
frontend/src/components/TreatmentValidat: A container component that renders a grid of TreatmentCard components for various treatment types (ICU, Surgical, etc.) and manages opening a TreatmentChecklistModal for the selected treatment.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating button component that links to a WhatsApp chat with a predefined phone number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions, including user profile CRUD, admin checks, and registration submission/approval mutations for healthcare professionals, vendors, NGOs, and ambulances.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including enterprise, health garden, and aqua life color palettes using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: A static About Us page featuring a hero section with a forest background image, a company values grid, and a demo booking modal dialog.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page that displays pending stakeholder registration requests (healthcare professionals, vendors, NGOs, ambulances) in tabbed cards, with access denied handling for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/AmbulanceServices.tsx: A registration page for ambulance services that includes a form with PIN code-based auto-fill for location fields and submits the registration request via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: An empty Blog page component with no content.
frontend/src/pages/BlogArticle.tsx: An empty BlogArticle page component with no content.
frontend/src/pages/Careers.tsx: A healthcare professional job application page with a form supporting PIN code-based location auto-fill, role selection, and CV file upload submitted via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/CaseStudies.tsx: A case studies page with a hero section, empty state placeholder, and multiple CTAs that open a demo booking modal dialog.
frontend/src/pages/CleanClaimIntelligenc: A product feature page detailing eight validation layers for healthcare claim intelligence, with accordion-style content and a demo booking modal.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: A contact page displaying phone, email, and location info cards alongside multiple CTAs that open a demo booking modal, plus an embedded Chatbot component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: An authenticated user dashboard that checks login state, loads the user profile, and prompts new users to complete their profile via a modal dialog.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentHome.tsx: A page with a hero section and file upload form that accepts PDFs and images, simulates an upload with a timeout, and navigates to the documents list on success.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Lists uploaded documents as cards with status badges using mock data, and provides navigation to view completed documents or upload new ones.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentViewer.tsx: Displays a single document's details (using mock data keyed by route param) with sections, summary, and export buttons for JSON and TXT formats.
frontend/src/pages/HealthcareSupportSyst: Displays a grid of healthcare support categories (workforce, ambulance, diagnostics, etc.) as cards with icons and images, routing to relevant pages or showing a toast on interest clicks.
A feature-rich marketing landing page for a health network with animated counters, intersection-observer scroll animations, ripple buttons, and stakeholder cards for different user types.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The main homepage composing several section components (HealthGardenTree, PlatformNavigationHub, HealthcareJourneyStory, ComprehensiveMetrics) plus a CTA section with a demo booking modal.
frontend/src/pages/KnowledgeBoard.tsx: Displays a knowledge board page about hospital licensing and regulatory compliance in India, featuring a hero section, accordion-based content sections, and a demo booking modal.
frontend/src/pages/Members.tsx: Renders a paginated grid of approved network members (professionals, vendors, NGOs) fetched via query hook, with a detail view modal on card click.
frontend/src/pages/NetworkDirectory.tsx: Provides a searchable, filterable directory of hospitals, vendors, and NGOs combined into a unified list, with a detail view panel for selected stakeholders.
frontend/src/pages/NetworkMap.tsx: Displays a visual network map page showing approved stakeholder locations grouped by city, with summary statistics cards and a locations grid.
frontend/src/pages/NgoListing.tsx: Shows a filterable list of registered NGOs and includes a registration form with PIN code-based auto-fill for location fields, submitting new NGO requests pending admin approval.
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/PatientJourney.tsx: Placeholder page for a Patient Journey Document Library feature, displaying a 'Coming Soon' card while the feature is under development.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders a static Privacy Policy page covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, user rights, and contact information for AI Health Zon.
frontend/src/pages/RCMSolutions.tsx: Displays a multi-phase Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) solutions page with an interactive phase navigator, surgical procedures section, claim protocols, and a demo booking modal.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Renders a static Refund Policy page detailing eligibility, request process, processing time, non-refundable items, and cancellation terms for AI Health Zon.
frontend/src/pages/Solutions.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditions.tsx: Renders a static Terms & Conditions page covering acceptance of terms, user responsibilities, intellectual property, liability limitations, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/Vendors.tsx: Provides a vendor registration form with PIN code-based auto-fill for Indian location fields and displays a list of existing vendors fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/pinCodeLookup.ts: Utility function that queries the India Post API to resolve an Indian 6-digit PIN code into district, state, and post office details.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom CSS-variable-based color tokens (including garden, enterprise, and chart palettes), custom border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for the 'Health Network' app, tracking one pending feature request (AR-1) to shift the landing page navigation bar ~192px downward via top padding or margin.
